report.summary: First standup after 3-day gap (Mar 29→Apr 1). BTC up to ~$67.7K-$68.5K (+2-3%), ETH $2,108 (+5.5%), but F&G cratered to 8 (Extreme Fear — worst reading yet). 432 uncommitted files now Day 7 without deploy — existential P0 escalated to emergency. 1,235 page.tsx on disk, zero new publishes since Mar 29.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: ~$67,712–$68,534 (up from $66,194–$66,943 on Mar 29). Holding above $67K. 24h range shows strength with previous close at $67,484. Q1 2026 closed with BTC down ~24% YTD — worst Q1 since 2022.
ETH: ~$2,108 (up from $1,995 on Mar 29, +5.5%). Up 2.31% in last 24h. 24h volume $9.88B–$20.2B across sources. Reclaimed $2,100 level — first time in over a week. ETH/BTC ratio improving slightly.

F&G INDEX: 8 (Extreme Fear) — DOWN from 10-25 range on Mar 29. This is the worst reading of the current streak, now 54+ days in Extreme Fear. Yesterday was 11, last week 14 — fear is accelerating despite prices rising. Classic divergence: prices up, sentiment down.

DELTA FROM LAST STANDUP (Mar 29 v4, 3-day gap): BTC +$1,500–$1,600 (+2.3%). ETH +$113 (+5.7%). F&G worsened (25→8). Uncommitted files 421→432 (+11). Page.tsx 1,233→1,235 (+2). Global crypto market cap $2.42T (+1.5% 24h). No new pages published in 3 days.

CRITICAL GAP: 3 days without standup coverage (Mar 30–31 missed). Any traffic spikes, indexing changes, or SEO movements during this window are untracked. GSC data for this period should be reviewed manually when access is available.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: 3-DAY GAP SINCE LAST CYCLE: Last full rotation was Mar 29 (4 standups, 2 builds, 1 publish, 3 design, 3 community, 3 eod = 16 runs). Zero agent runs Mar 30–31. This standup resumes operations.

WHAT WAS PLANNED (Mar 29 v4 priorities): (1) Deploy 421 uncommitted files — NOT DONE, now 432 files. (2) Q1 close content — UNKNOWN if manually handled. (3) Promote new learn pages + unblock 2 queue items — NOT DONE (queue still has blocked items).

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS (WORSENED): (1) P0 CRITICAL — 432 uncommitted files (+11 from Mar 29), HEAD at 21aaf5b since Mar 25 (DAY 7 — one full week without deploy). (2) P1 — 2 blocked queue items still unresolved (wallet-security slug mismatch, restaking missing page.tsx). (3) P2 — ~105 legacy slugs missing page.tsx (~82% coverage). (4) P3 — 147+ TS errors (non-blocking). (5) P3 — CoinGecko free tier rate limit risk.

GIT STATUS: 432 files pending (+11 from Mar 29). Last commit Mar 25 (21aaf5b). Every hour without deploy = lost indexing for 77+ published slugs, 14+ learn pages, 6+ OG images, all UX fixes. This is now a full week of accumulated work sitting in working tree.
NEW RISK: 3-day agent gap means no QA, no community engagement, no design polish ran. Any issues introduced Mar 30-31 are undetected.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — EMERGENCY DEPLOY [DAY 7 — FULL WEEK WITHOUT DEPLOY]: 432 uncommitted files represent one full week of accumulated work — pages, guides, OG images, UX fixes, all invisible to production and Google. This has been P0 for 7 consecutive days across 5 standups. Jefe action required: `git add -A && git commit -m 'batch deploy' && git push`. Nothing else matters until this ships. Every additional hour compounds the indexing debt.

PRIORITY 2 — Q1 RETROSPECTIVE (TIME-SENSITIVE): Q1 2026 is now officially closed. BTC -24% YTD, ETH -60%, SOL -72%, F&G at 8 (lowest yet). This is prime content window — 'Q1 2026 Crypto Market Recap' page would capture high-intent search traffic. Tweets #243-245 were queued Mar 29 but may be stale. Build cycle should produce a dedicated Q1 retrospective page + refresh social content.

PRIORITY 3 — RESUME FULL AGENT ROTATION: 3-day gap means community engagement, QA, and design polish all stalled. Next cycle should run full 6-agent rotation to catch up: build new content, publish queued pages, QA the accumulated changes, refresh community presence, and polish any UX regressions.

report.email: SKIPPED — api.resend.com blocked from browser (CORS/Failed to fetch). Same sandbox egress limitation as all previous cycles. Manual send or server-side relay needed.
